name: MCP context optimization layer
current_usage_summary: Industry converged on fixing MCP token cost without abandoning protocol: (1) Tool Search / defer_loading—load tool defs on demand (~85% reduction, Claude Code 2.1.7+). (2) Programmatic tool calling—agent writes code in sandbox to call tools, filter results, only final output in context (~37% reduction). (3) Code Mode—two tools search/execute over OpenAPI (~99.9% vs naive MCP for Cloudflare-scale APIs). Insight: overhead is exposure policy, not MCP wire format. GAX thesis aligns: lazy discovery + projection + in-daemon processing mirror these patterns with CLI ergonomics.
typical_stack: Anthropic betas: tool_search, code_execution_20260120. Cloudflare @cloudflare/codemode + Workers sandbox. Claude Code config enables deferred MCP tools. Skills teach orchestration atop lean tool surface.
auth_and_identity_model: Unchanged from base MCP—optimization is client-side. Sandboxes need isolated credentials injection same as MCP server auth.
context_and_token_behavior: Before: 50 tools ≈ 77K tokens → after tool search ≈ 8.7K. Programmatic calling prevents intermediate JSON in chat. Code Mode: ~1K tokens for 2500 endpoints. Accuracy improvements reported when noise reduced (Opus 4 selection 49%→74%).
operational_pain_points: Sandbox hosting cost and security review. Not all MCP clients implement tool search yet—fragmented savings. Debugging harder when logic runs in generated code.
developer_experience_friction: Server authors must still design for code orchestration (return composable data). Two mental models: classic tools vs code mode.
gax_mapping: GAX bakes optimization into protocol defaults: registry in gaxd (not context), `gax search/doc`, `surface=model` truncation, `--jq` and `gax plan` in daemon. Equivalent to 'always on' tool search + programmatic post-processing without requiring JS sandbox in client—optional plan executor in gaxd.
migration_phases: Teams already on optimized MCP: migrate to GAX for governance delta, not token delta—pitch caps/audit. Teams on naive MCP: GAX + thin MCP shim beats raw 40-tool schema dump.
adapter_or_bridge_strategy: Code Mode MCP server can be implemented AS gaxd meta-commands (search schema registry, execute registered HTTP adapter). Manifest generator from OpenAPI (roadmap) is GAX-native Code Mode.
breaking_changes_and_mitigations: Lose client-specific sandboxes if moving processing to gaxd—mitigate WASM/isolated workers inside gaxd for untrusted jq.
infrastructure_changes: gaxd hosts registry index for search; optional embedded JS runtime for plan steps (security boundary).
deployment_topology: Optimization runs server-side (gaxd) vs client-side (Claude sandbox)—enterprise may prefer server-side for data residency.
adoption_drivers: Organizations already sold on 'fix MCP tokens' understand GAX value prop immediately—governance plus same economics.
adoption_blockers: If Claude/Cursor keep improving native MCP client, GAX must exceed combined feature set (MCP Apps, elicitation).
adoption_timeline_estimate: Optimization patterns mainstream 2026; GAX competes as governance superset 2027+.
historical_parallel: HTTP/2 server push vs client caching—where processing lives shifts, problem (bloat) same.

primary_sources.title: Claude Code MCP tool search analysis
